Hello! 👋

I'm Vinudi Premadasa

About Me

I am a high school student with hands‑on experience developing production‑level browser‑extension features through the ThinkNeuro Software Engineering Practicum. I have competed in FIRST Robotics and led robotics engineering efforts in Sri Lanka, along with building IoT systems such as smart greenhouse automation.

Projects

01

Smart Greenhouse Automation

Arduino‑based IoT system that automates soil moisture, water flow, and nutrient delivery for sustainable agriculture.

ThinkNeuro Browser Extension Engineering
